text.title: event-sourcing-fundamentals Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for event-sourcing-fundamentals as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Mutable event objects — setting fields after instantiation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mutable events allow post-hoc tampering with history. Use frozen dataclasses / records so mutation is a compile-time error.

failure-mode.description: Large catch-all events: OrderUpdated(entire_order_data: dict) carrying the full state snapshot.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Snapshot-style events destroy the audit trail — you can no longer answer "what specific business action triggered this change". Use fine-grained events: OrderItemAdded, ShippingAddressChanged, etc.
